title: Baked Brie en Croûte
description: A French-inspired appetizer featuring a wheel of brie cheese baked in a flaky croissant crust.
instructions: Unroll the puff pastry and roll out to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out a circle of pastry large enough to fit the brie cheese.
Place the brie cheese in the center of the pastry circle.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the softened butter.
Fold the pastry over the cheese, pressing gently to seal.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the top of the pastry with the remaining butter.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Garnish with fresh thyme and serve with honey, if desired.
